hero.title: Learn to Read & Write Lao
hero.titleLao: ຮຽນພາສາລາວ
hero.subtitle: Master the beautiful Lao script through interactive lessons, quizzes, and writing practice

consonants.title: Consonants
consonants.desc: Learn the 33 consonants of the Lao alphabet with audio pronunciation

vowels.title: Vowels
vowels.desc: Master the 28 vowels and their positions around consonants

tones.title: Tones
tones.desc: Understand the 6 tones that give Lao its melodic quality

vocabulary.title: Vocabulary
vocabulary.desc: Build your word bank with 200+ essential Lao words

quiz.title: Quiz
quiz.desc: Test your knowledge with recognition, listening, and writing quizzes

writing.title: Writing Practice
writing.desc: Practice writing Lao characters with guided stroke order

reason1.title: Rich Cultural Heritage
reason1.desc: Lao language opens the door to a vibrant culture shaped by Buddhism, ancient traditions, and warm hospitality.

reason2.title: Travel with Confidence
reason2.desc: Navigate Laos like a local — read menus, signs, and connect with people in their native tongue.

reason3.title: Unique Writing System
reason3.desc: The elegant Lao script, derived from ancient Khmer, is a beautiful and rewarding system to learn.

reason4.title: Gateway to Southeast Asia
reason4.desc: Lao shares roots with Thai, giving you a foundation to explore multiple languages in the region.
